faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers for frequently asked questions before you launch on Attrax.

1.a: Yes. You can launch a listing for free and upgrade later if you need premium placement.

2.a: Most submissions are reviewed within 24 to 48 hours depending on queue volume.

3.a: Yes. You can update copy, media, and offers at any time from the console.

4.a: Yes. We offer a 30-day no-questions-asked refund for users.
